note: ReviewAcceptProposal (internal/app/review_proposals.go) now normalizes the CLI principal unconditionally — explicit --by "" records decided_by: manual — with the write path extracted into internal acceptReviewProposal, mirroring clarify.go's structure. The review loop's acceptReviewLoopProposal (internal/app/review_loop.go) calls the internal path with "" so automatic loop decisions still omit decided_by. Regression pinned by a new exact-empty --by case in TestReviewProposalDecisionsRecordExplicitBy.

Added repo-root path sanitization coverage for the newly extended verbs: TestContractAcceptDraftRecordsExplicitBy (internal/app/contract_draft_test.go) gained a sanitizes-repo-root-paths subtest asserting accepted_by and the raw draft-proposal.json contain no absolute root, and TestClarifyAnswerRecordsExplicitBy (internal/app/clarify_test.go) now answers a second question with a root-path --by and asserts decided_by and the raw decisions.jsonl are sanitized, matching the existing review proposal test pattern.
